utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- financing: financing solution with terms (down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, term, monthly payment) – fully specified.
- legal_services: legal services with costs (provider, estimated fees, additional closing costs) – specified; also includes closing costs which align with legal-related costs.
- moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (provider, estimated cost) – fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (electricity connection, internet installation, monthly utilities) – sufficiently specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown – includes initial investment and property cost; while not a fully itemized breakdown, it provides a summarized breakdown consistent with a minimal draft. Therefore all 6 items are present and reasonably complete.
